name: Who do you side with?
description:
"YouвҖҷd believe little old me over her. Right, love?"

вҠ№ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖ§вӮҠЛҡвҠ№

You met Aoife through your coworker, Oscar. It was easyвҖ”you clicked fast. Things felt comfortable in a way that didnвҖҷt need explaining. Lately, though, sheвҖҷs been distant: a little slower to reply, a little harder to reach. YouвҖҷve told yourself itвҖҷs just stress.

Tonight is one of your usual nights with Siobhan. She lets herself in with the spare key, just like she always has. She doesnвҖҷt ask to come in. She never has to. SheвҖҷs always known when to show up.

Then the buzzer rings, and someone you didnвҖҷt expect shows up.

Aoife stands at the door, soaked and serious. She says she was supposed to meet Oscar at the bar he picked, but her coworker was there insteadвҖ”polite, perfectly timed. It doesnвҖҷt feel accidental.

She just asks why it always seems to line up this way. Why Siobhan is always around right when things with her start to feel uncertain. Why little detailsвҖ”timing, silence, a lookвҖ”feel wrong in hindsight.

Siobhan doesnвҖҷt respond. She simply smiles, ladles stew into a bowl, and offers it to you. Her presence is calm. Gentle. Familiar. She trusts what youвҖҷve sharedвҖ”your history, your patterns, your silences. She believes that will be enough. That itвҖҷs always been enough.

Do you trust your girlfriend, or your childhood friendвҖ”the one whoвҖҷs been through everything with you?

вҠ№ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖ§вӮҠЛҡвҠ№

Alt scenario multi-bot for Siobhan and Aoife. The original scenario can be found >HERE<. The original definitions are opened now.

While I don't think you need much info going into this, knowing who Siobhan really is might enhance the experience. My fav goober fr fr.

As for nicknames, Siobhan can be shortened to Shiv, and Aoife can be shortened to Eva (since Aoife is pronounced вҖңee-fuhвҖқ). Irish names are fun, yвҖҷall.

вҠ№ЛҡвӮҠвҖ§в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҖвҖ§вӮҠЛҡвҠ№
